title: source_packet_manifest
description: Per-packet evidence record (0a.-1.D). One row per evidence_packet_id.

canonical_source_ids.description: Alias-resolved canonical_source_id values; source-document-level set. minItems:1 enforces D3 §2.1 zero-source fail-closed (a 0-source packet is a construction error, not E1/E0).
